Bus Timings

Bus C5 Timetable Gold Souq Bus Station to Ghubaiba Bus Station

August 17, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Let me tell you about Bus C5 in Dubai - it’s a real gem. This bus zips between Gold Souq Bus Station and Ghubaiba Bus Station, and it’s a total game-changer for getting around. Whether you’re a local trying to get to work or a tourist out to see the sights, this bus has got you covered. It hits up all these cool spots - you know, the big landmarks, shopping areas, and neighborhoods where everyone wants to go.

The best part? It’s not some cramped, uncomfortable ride. If you’re trying to crack the code of getting around Dubai without losing your mind, Bus C5 is your secret weapon.

Route Name C5
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 13 - Ghubaiba Bus Station · 4
Total Distance Approximately 3,5 kilometees
Total Journey Time Approximately 34 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 23:20 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus C5 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Gold Souq Bus Station From Ghubaiba Bus Station

Bus C5 Timetable

For full details on timings, refer to the RTA official site, or click this link for Bus C5 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus C5 is generally affordable, with ticket prices typically around AED 3. This makes it an economical choice for both daily commuting and for visiting various destinations across Dubai. The low fare ensures that passengers can travel comfortably without putting a strain on their budget.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no online booking option available for Bus C5. Passengers can purchase tickets directly on the bus or use a Nol Card, which is accepted for all public transportation in Dubai. The Nol Card provides a convenient payment method and can be topped up at various Metro stations and authorized retailers throughout the city.

Bus Route

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 13

  2. Hyatt Regency Hotel

  3. Murar Jadeed

  4. Al Nakhal

  5. Union Metro · 1

  6. Etisalat Head Office

  7. Maktoum Road

  8. Clock Tower Roundabout

  9. British Council

  10. BurJuman Metro, 3

  11. Consulate Area

  12. Al Wasl University

  13. Central Post Office

  14. Schools Health Center

  15. Commercial Center

  16. Karama

  17. Karama, 2

  18. Centre Point Shopping Centre

  19. BurJuman Metro, 2

  20. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  21. Sharaf DG Metro · 3

  22. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  23. Nahda Street

  24. Raffa

  25. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 4

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the C9 bus route, which travels from Al Qiyadah Metro to Satwa Bus Station, and the C15 route, which runs from Deira City Center Bus Station to Mamzar Beach Park Terminus.

Bus C5 Station Overview

Gold Souq Bus Station · 13

Gold Souq Bus Station, located in the vibrant Gold Souq area, is a crucial transit point for travelers exploring Dubai’s bustling market district. This station provides convenient access to the numerous shops and attractions in the vicinity. It is equipped with essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates. The station’s central location makes it a key hub for connecting passengers to other bus routes and important destinations throughout Dubai.

British Council Bus Stop Intersection

This strategic location offers passengers seamless connections across different routes, enhancing the overall convenience and efficiency of travel in the area. The bus stop’s integration with these routes ensures accessible and well-connected options for both daily commuters and occasional travelers.

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 4

As a key junction in Dubai’s public transport network, it provides seamless connections to various routes and facilitates easy access to the surrounding commercial and residential areas.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus C5 route passes through several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai. Here are some highlights along the route:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 13: Located near the famous Gold Souk, a traditional market known for its extensive range of gold jewelry and other precious metals.

2.

  1. Murar Jadeed: This area is close to various local markets and eateries, giving a glimpse of traditional Dubai life.

  2. Al Nakhal: A residential area with several local attractions and community spaces.

  3. Union Metro · 1: Located near the Union Metro Station, a major interchange for the Dubai Metro system, providing easy access to other parts of the city.

  4. Etisalat Head Office: The headquarters of Etisalat, one of the leading telecommunications companies in the UAE.

  5. Maktoum Road: A key road in Dubai that connects various important areas and is home to numerous businesses and shops.

8.

  1. British Council: An important cultural center that promotes English language learning and cultural exchange.

  2. BurJuman Metro, 3: Located near the BurJuman Mall, a major shopping destination with a wide range of international and local stores.

  3. Consulate Area: Hosts several international consulates, providing essential services for expatriates and tourists.

  4. Al Wasl University: An educational institution offering various academic programs and courses.

  5. Central Post Office: A historic and important post office in Dubai, offering postal services to the public.

  6. Schools Health Center: Provides health services to the community, including students and families.

  7. Commercial Center: An area bustling with shopping and business activities.

  8. Karama: A popular area known for its vibrant market, offering a range of goods and local foods.

  9. Centre Point Shopping Centre: A shopping mall providing retail, dining, and entertainment options.

  10. Four Points Sheraton Hotel: A well-known hotel offering comfortable accommodations and various amenities.

  11. Sharaf DG Metro · 3: Located near the Sharaf DG Metro Station, which is a key point for accessing different parts of the city.

  12. Nahda Street: A bustling area with a mix of residential and commercial spaces.

21.

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 4: A major bus terminal in Dubai, providing connections to various parts of the city.

These stops provide a mix of cultural, commercial, and educational destinations, making Bus C5 a convenient option for exploring Dubai’s diverse attractions.

Journey Experience

Bus Route C5 from Gold Souq Bus Station to Ghubaiba Bus Station offers a long and interesting journey through the dynamic city of Dubai.

The trip ends at Ghubaiba, a major transport hub near the vibrant Al Seef waterfront area.

Travelling with Careem

The ride typically costs between AED 25 and AED 30, providing a cost-effective and comfortable way to reach this major bus terminal in Dubai. The app also allows for easy fare estimates and booking options, ensuring a smooth travel experience.

Bus C5 is a vital component of Dubai’s public transportation network, offering an economical and convenient way to travel between Gold Souq and Ghubaiba. With its extensive route covering numerous key stops, frequent services throughout the day, and affordable fare, it caters well to both locals and visitors. While online booking is not available, the Nol Card makes payment straightforward and accessible. For real-time updates and further information, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app to plan their journeys effectively.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 17, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
